summary: Frontend-only verification of Fork·Fate theme scenes, readability, radius slider, tiki fringe scroll, cyber neon centering, steampunk elements, and full shuffle flow (audio + result card) for tiki & steam. All 9 features/checks PASS. Used exactly 2 real 'Deal your fate' clicks (well under the 3-shuffle budget).
critical_code_review_comments: The only console errors observed on all themes were CORS failures for https://ipapi.co/latitude/ (external geolocation lookup). Non-blocking, but the app should either use a CORS-friendly endpoint (e.g. https://api.ipify.org) or a server-side proxy so no browser errors appear in production.
seed_data_creation: Set localStorage ff_theme per test, ff_guided_seen=1, ff_theme_hint_seen=1. Cleared ff_muted. Zip=10001. Real Google Places calls: 2 (tiki + steam).

verified_scenarios.themes_render_no_crash: PASS for dark, tiki, steam, cyber, fall, winter, spring, summer (body length ~3063-3069, no pageerrors)
verified_scenarios.ambiance_scene_data_testid: PASS - ambiance-scene-tiki, ambiance-scene-steam, ambiance-scene-cyber all present
verified_scenarios.readability_counter_light_on_dark_themes: PASS - fates-dealt-counter computed color: dark=rgba(255,255,255,.72) lum255, tiki=rgb(251,227,192) lum229, steam=rgb(241,217,166) lum218, cyber=rgb(199,125,255) lum150. Seasonal themes stay dark (lum~111) which is fine on light bg.
verified_scenarios.readability_plus_N_more_button: PASS - '+ 53 more' button text color light on dark/ambient themes (dark=255,255,255; tiki=251,227,192; steam=241,217,166; cyber=199,125,255). Seasonal themes use dark-on-light which is fine.
verified_scenarios.cuisine_and_zip_labels: PASS - filters panel has a light/white card background on all themes; CUISINE and YOUR ZIP CODE labels are dark text on the light panel and clearly readable (visible in screenshots).
verified_scenarios.radius_slider_zero_min: PASS - left-end label reads '0 MI'; slider is Radix Slider (span[data-testid=radius-slider]) with aria-label containing 'Search radius'. Visual confirms 0 mi ... 50 mi range.
verified_scenarios.tiki_fringe_child_of_header_and_scrolls_: PASS - tiki-grass image parent tag = HEADER, closest('header')=true. On window.scrollTo(0,200): fringe.top delta = -200 (matches header delta = -200). Header is position:sticky and the fringe moves with it.
verified_scenarios.tiki_social_share_z_order: PASS - [data-testid=app-social-share] has z-index=40 and renders at top of header (rect visible above fringe area)
verified_scenarios.cyber_neon_centered: PASS - neon image (cyber-neon-logo.png) center = 960px, viewport width = 1920px, offset = 0px (well within ~30px tolerance)
verified_scenarios.steam_scene_elements: PASS - steam-wall.png, steam-console.png, steam-arc-device.png all rendered. 10 animated elements found including ffCableSway (roof cables), ffArcFlicker (arc device polyline), ffArcGlow, ffSteam (steam puffs).
verified_scenarios.tiki_full_shuffle: PASS - shuffling-deck appeared, card-back imgs = /tiki-mask.png (5/5 samples). Network: /api/places/search 200; /reveal-drums-groove.wav 206 (shuffle loop); /reveal-drums-boom.wav 206 (reveal); /api/places/photo 200. spin-result-card appeared.
verified_scenarios.steam_full_shuffle: PASS - shuffling-deck appeared, card-back imgs = /steam-gears.png (5/5 samples). Network: /api/places/search 200; /shuffle-jacobs.wav 206 (shuffle loop); /reveal-steam.wav 206 (reveal); /api/places/photo 200. spin-result-card appeared.
verified_scenarios.console_errors: Only external CORS error from ipapi.co (not blocking). No pageerrors, no app-code errors.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All session changes verified working. Total real Google Places shuffles spent this run: 2 (tiki + steam). If next session needs to spend more, remember daily hard cap = 160. Note: audio wav files return HTTP 206 Partial Content (Range requests) — that is expected and equivalent to 200 OK for playback.
